answer: This workflow introduces high-risk exposure because onboarding spans India and the UAE while customer due diligence, travel rule handling, and enhanced monitoring controls are not fully described.
riskFlags: Enhanced due diligence requirements are missing for higher-risk users.
Cross-border monitoring controls are not defined.
recommendations: Add enhanced due diligence for higher-risk customer segments.
Document travel rule and sanctions screening controls before launch.
reasoningSteps: Mapped the workflow to cross-border onboarding obligations.
Checked whether the workflow described KYC and monitoring controls.

citations.title: KYC Direction
citations.text: Regulated entities must apply stronger due diligence to higher-risk relationships.
